```{r fig_tripmap, fig.height=fig_h_tripmap}
      x = NULL, y = NULL,
      caption  = fig_nums("tripmap")
    ) +
    theme(
      legend.position      = "bottom",
      legend.box           = "horizontal",
      legend.box.just      = "center",
      legend.justification = "center",
      legend.margin        = margin(t = 4, b = 2),
      legend.spacing.x     = unit(6, "pt"),
      legend.text          = element_text(size = 8),
      legend.title         = element_text(size = 8, face = "bold"),
      legend.key.size      = unit(1.2, "lines"),
      plot.caption         = element_text(size = 9, face = "italic", hjust = 0)
    )

  print(p)
}
```

\newpage

<!-- ########################################################################################## -->
<!-- Figure 2: Catch per haul per species (faceted map)                                       -->
<!-- ########################################################################################## -->

```{r fig_catchperspecies_setup}
# Tight bbox — haul positions + vm (ports) so routes are never clipped
all_lons2 <- c(
  if (has_elog_trek) et$shoot_lon[!is.na(et$shoot_lon)],
  if (has_haul)       h$shoot_lon[!is.na(h$shoot_lon)],
  if (has_elog)       e$shoot_lon[!is.na(e$shoot_lon)],
  if (has_vm)         vm$lon[!is.na(vm$lon)]
)
all_lats2 <- c(
  if (has_elog_trek) et$shoot_lat[!is.na(et$shoot_lat)],
  if (has_haul)       h$shoot_lat[!is.na(h$shoot_lat)],
  if (has_elog)       e$shoot_lat[!is.na(e$shoot_lat)],
  if (has_vm)         vm$lat[!is.na(vm$lat)]
)

if (length(all_lons2) > 0) {
  lr2 <- range(all_lons2, na.rm = TRUE)
  la2 <- range(all_lats2, na.rm = TRUE)
  if (diff(lr2) == 0) lr2 <- lr2 + c(-0.5, 0.5)
  if (diff(la2) == 0) la2 <- la2 + c(-0.3, 0.3)
  buf_lon <- diff(lr2) * 0.05
  buf_lat <- diff(la2) * 0.05
  xmin2 <- floor((lr2[1] - buf_lon) * 4) / 4
  xmax2 <- ceiling((lr2[2] + buf_lon) * 4) / 4
  ymin2 <- floor((la2[1] - buf_lat) * 4) / 4
  ymax2 <- ceiling((la2[2] + buf_lat) * 4) / 4
} else {
  xmin2 <- xmin; xmax2 <- xmax; ymin2 <- ymin; ymax2 <- ymax
}

# Aspect-corrected figure height for facet grid
# Guard: ensure non-zero extent before arcdist
if (xmin2 == xmax2) { xmin2 <- xmin2 - 0.5; xmax2 <- xmax2 + 0.5 }
if (ymin2 == ymax2) { ymin2 <- ymin2 - 0.3; ymax2 <- ymax2 + 0.3 }
xd2  <- icosa::arcdist(p1 = c(xmin2, ymin2), p2 = c(xmax2, ymin2))
yd2  <- icosa::arcdist(p1 = c(xmin2, ymin2), p2 = c(xmin2, ymax2))
asp2 <- if (is.finite(xd2) && xd2 > 0) yd2 / xd2 else 1.0

# ── Dynamic layout ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# asp2 = height/width ratio of the map extent (already calculated above).
# We want panels that are as square as possible and fill the page.
#
# Page geometry (A4, normal margins):
#   text width  ≈ 6.3"   text height ≈ 9.2" (minus title+legend ≈ 0.8")
#   knitr fig.width = 10 → Word scale factor = 6.3/10 = 0.63
#
# For a grid of ncol × nrows panels:
#   panel_w = text_w / ncol            (in actual inches on page)
#   panel_h = panel_w * asp2           (preserving map aspect)
#   total_h = panel_h * nrows + 0.8   (+ title/legend)
#
# We want total_h ≤ page_h_usable.
# Rearranging: nrows ≤ (page_h_usable - 0.8) / (text_w / ncol * asp2)
#
# Strategy: try ncol = 2,3,4 and pick the one where the resulting grid
# best fills the page (maximises nspecies shown without exceeding page).

page_h    <- max_fig_h * 0.63  # derived from max_fig_h
text_w    <- 6.3    # usable text width in inches
legend_h  <- 0.8   # title + legend row

best <- local({
  results <- lapply(2:5, function(nc) {
    panel_w <- text_w / nc
    panel_h <- panel_w * asp2
    max_rows <- floor((page_h - legend_h) / panel_h)
    max_rows <- max(max_rows, 1)
    fits     <- min(nc * max_rows, nspecies)
    # score: maximise species shown, penalise empty cells
    empty    <- nc * max_rows - fits
    list(ncol = nc, nrows = max_rows, fits = fits, empty = empty,
         total_h = panel_h * max_rows + legend_h)
  })
  # Pick the layout that shows the most species; break ties by fewest empties
  scores <- sapply(results, function(r) r$fits * 100 - r$empty)
  results[[which.max(scores)]]
})

ncol2          <- best$ncol
nrows2         <- best$nrows
nspecies_plot  <- best$fits   # may be less than nspecies if page is tall
fig_asp2       <- best$total_h / text_w * (text_w / (text_w))  # h/w for knitr
# fig.asp = total_h_on_page / text_w — but knitr uses fig.width=10 in device inches
# so fig.height = fig.asp * fig.width where fig.asp = total_h / text_w * (10/6.3... wait)
# Simpler: fig.height in knitr device inches = total_page_h / word_scale
word_scale <- text_w / 10
fig_h2     <- min(best$total_h / word_scale, max_fig_h)

# Crop world to tight bbox
map_bbox2 <- sf::st_bbox(c(xmin = xmin2, xmax = xmax2,
                            ymin = ymin2, ymax = ymax2),
                          crs = sf::st_crs(4326))
sf::sf_use_s2(FALSE)
world_crop2 <- tryCatch(sf::st_crop(world_mr_sf, map_bbox2),
                         error = function(e) world_crop)
eez_crop2   <- if (!is.null(eez_sf)) {
  tryCatch(sf::st_crop(eez_sf, map_bbox2), error = function(e) NULL)
} else { NULL }
sf::sf_use_s2(TRUE)

# Depth tile for tight bbox (reuse bathy_df if extent overlaps, else skip)
depth_layer2 <- if (!is.null(bathy_df)) {
  bathy_sub <- dplyr::filter(bathy_df,
                               x >= xmin2, x <= xmax2,
                               y >= ymin2, y <= ymax2,
                               z <= 0)
  if (nrow(bathy_sub) > 0) {
    list(geom_tile(data = bathy_sub, aes(x = x, y = y, fill = z)),
         scale_fill_gradientn(
           colours  = c("#08306b","#2171b5","#6baed6","#c6dbef"),
           values   = scales::rescale(c(-500,-100,-20,0)),
           limits   = c(NA, 0), na.value = "transparent",
           name     = if (lang == "nl") "Diepte (m)" else "Depth (m)",
           guide    = guide_colorbar(barwidth = 4, barheight = 0.4,
                                     title.position = "top",
                                     direction = "horizontal", order = 3)))
  } else { list() }
} else { list() }
```

```{r fig_catchperspecies, fig.width=10, fig.height=fig_h2, out.width="100%", dpi=150}

fig_nums("catchperspecies", display = FALSE,
         caption = if (lang == "nl") "Vangst per trek per soort (kg)"
                   else "Catch per haul by species (kg)")

# Haul-level catch per species from best source
if (has_elog_trek && any(!is.na(et$shoot_lon))) {
  haul_sp <- et %>%
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(shoot_lon), !is.na(shoot_lat),
                  species_code %in% myspecies$species_code[seq_len(nspecies_plot)]) %>%
    dplyr::group_by(haul_id, shoot_lon, shoot_lat, species_code) %>%
    dplyr::summarise(weight_kg = sum(weight_kg, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")
} else if (has_kisten && has_haul &&
           any(!is.na(h$shoot_lon))) {
  # kisten has weight but no position — join positions from haul
  haul_pos <- h %>%
    dplyr::select(haul_id, shoot_lon, shoot_lat) %>%
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(shoot_lon), !is.na(shoot_lat)) %>%
    dplyr::distinct(haul_id, .keep_all = TRUE)
  haul_sp <- m %>%
    dplyr::filter(species_code %in% myspecies$species_code[seq_len(nspecies_plot)]) %>%
    dplyr::group_by(haul_id, species_code) %>%
    dplyr::summarise(weight_kg = sum(weight_kg, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
    dplyr::inner_join(haul_pos, by = "haul_id")
} else if (has_elog && "haul_id" %in% names(e) && any(!is.na(e$shoot_lon))) {
  haul_sp <- e %>%
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(shoot_lon), !is.na(shoot_lat),
                  species_code %in% myspecies$species_code[seq_len(nspecies_plot)]) %>%
    dplyr::group_by(haul_id, shoot_lon, shoot_lat, species_code) %>%
    dplyr::summarise(weight_kg = sum(weight_kg, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")
} else if (has_elog && any(!is.na(e$shoot_lon))) {
  # elog without haul_id — use position as proxy
  haul_sp <- e %>%
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(shoot_lon), !is.na(shoot_lat),
                  species_code %in% myspecies$species_code[seq_len(nspecies_plot)]) %>%
    dplyr::group_by(shoot_lon, shoot_lat, species_code) %>%
    dplyr::summarise(weight_kg = sum(weight_kg, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
    dplyr::mutate(haul_id = dplyr::row_number())
} else if (has_elog && "ices_rect" %in% names(e) && any(!is.na(e$ices_rect))) {
  # Fallback: use ICES rect centroids as positions, daily catch per species
  rect_coords2 <- ices_rect_to_lonlat(e$ices_rect)
  haul_sp <- e %>%
    dplyr::mutate(shoot_lon = rect_coords2$lon, shoot_lat = rect_coords2$lat) %>%
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(shoot_lon), !is.na(shoot_lat),
                  species_code %in% myspecies$species_code[seq_len(nspecies_plot)]) %>%
    dplyr::group_by(date, shoot_lon, shoot_lat, species_code) %>%
    dplyr::summarise(weight_kg = sum(weight_kg, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
    dplyr::mutate(haul_id = dplyr::row_number())
} else { haul_sp <- NULL }

if (!is.null(haul_sp) && nrow(haul_sp) > 0) {

  haul_sp_sf <- sf::st_as_sf(haul_sp,
                               coords = c("shoot_lon", "shoot_lat"),
                               crs = 4326, remove = FALSE)

  # Facet label: "Soort (CODE)" or "Species (CODE)"
  # Add species names and build facet labels
  name_col <- if (lang == "nl") "dutchname" else "englishname"

  # Ordered levels from myspecies (already has dutchname/englishname)
  lbl_levels <- myspecies %>%
    dplyr::slice_head(n = nspecies_plot) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      nm  = dplyr::coalesce(.data[[name_col]], species_code),
      lbl = paste0(nm, " (", species_code, ")")
    ) %>%
    dplyr::pull(lbl)

  # Join names onto haul_sp_sf, create facet_lbl, then factor it
  haul_sp_sf <- haul_sp_sf %>%
    dplyr::left_join(
      dplyr::select(asfis, species, dutchname, englishname),
      by = c("species_code" = "species")
    ) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      sp_name   = dplyr::coalesce(.data[[name_col]], species_code),
      facet_lbl = paste0(sp_name, " (", species_code, ")")
    ) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      facet_lbl = factor(facet_lbl, levels = lbl_levels)
    )

  # Add day label to haul_sp_sf for discrete colour scale.
  # For elog_rect, date is already in haul_sp_sf (grouped by date); skip join.
  if (!"date" %in% names(haul_sp_sf)) {
    src_dates2 <- if (has_elog_trek) dplyr::distinct(et, haul_id, date)
                  else if (has_haul) dplyr::distinct(h,  haul_id, date)
                  else               dplyr::distinct(e,  haul_id, date)
    haul_sp_sf <- dplyr::left_join(haul_sp_sf, src_dates2, by = "haul_id")
  }
  haul_sp_sf <- haul_sp_sf %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      day_lbl = factor(format(as.Date(date), "%d/%m"),
                       levels = sort(unique(format(as.Date(date), "%d/%m"))))
    )
  day_levels2  <- levels(haul_sp_sf$day_lbl)
  day_colours2 <- setNames(pal_day_pal(length(day_levels2)), day_levels2)

  p2 <- ggplot() +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(
      panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white"),
      panel.border     = element_rect(fill = NA, colour = "grey40", linewidth = 0.3),
      panel.grid       = element_blank(),
      plot.margin      = unit(c(0, 0, 0, 0), "cm"),
      strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey92", colour = "grey60"),
      strip.text       = element_text(size = 6, face = "bold", margin = margin(1,1,1,1)),
      axis.text        = element_text(size = 5),
      legend.position      = "bottom",
      legend.box           = "horizontal",
      legend.box.just      = "center",
      legend.justification = "center",
      legend.margin        = margin(t = 4, b = 2),
      legend.spacing.x     = unit(6, "pt"),
      legend.text          = element_text(size = 7),
      legend.title         = element_text(size = 7, face = "bold"),
      legend.key.size      = unit(1.0, "lines")
    ) +
    depth_layer2 +
    ggnewscale::new_scale_fill() +
    geom_sf(data = world_crop2, fill = "grey82", colour = "grey55", linewidth = 0.2) +
    { if (!is.null(eez_crop2)) geom_sf(data = eez_crop2, fill = NA,
        colour = "grey20", linewidth = 0.6, linetype = "solid") else NULL } +
    # Route trajectory (reuse route_sf from fig 1 — same trip)
{ if (!is.null(route_sf)) {
        rc <- if (!is.null(trip_colour_map))
          dplyr::left_join(route_sf, trip_colour_map, by = "trip_id") %>%
            dplyr::mutate(colour = dplyr::if_else(is.na(colour), "yellow", colour))
        else
          dplyr::mutate(route_sf, colour = "yellow")
        # Use aes colour mapping instead of per-row loops to avoid Reduce(+, NULL)
        geom_sf(data = rc, aes(colour = colour),
                linewidth = 1.2, linetype = "dashed", alpha = 0.95,
                show.legend = FALSE)
      } else NULL } +
    # Departure / arrival ports
    scale_colour_identity() +
    { if (!is.null(ports_sf) && nrow(ports_sf) > 0) list(
        geom_sf(data = ports_sf, colour = "red", fill = "red",
                shape = 21, size = 3, stroke = 1.0),
        geom_sf_text(data = ports_sf, aes(label = port),
                     colour = "red", size = 2.2, fontface = "bold",
                     nudge_y = (ymax2 - ymin2) * 0.03,
                     check_overlap = TRUE))
      else NULL } +
    coord_sf(xlim = c(xmin2, xmax2), ylim = c(ymin2, ymax2), expand = FALSE) +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = scales::extended_breaks(n = 3)(c(xmin2, xmax2)),
                       labels = function(x) fmt_dms(x, is_lon = TRUE),
                       expand = c(0, 0)) +
    scale_y_continuous(breaks = scales::extended_breaks(n = 3)(c(ymin2, ymax2)),
                       labels = function(x) fmt_dms(x, is_lon = FALSE),
                       expand = c(0, 0)) +
    geom_sf(data = haul_sp_sf,
            aes(size = weight_kg, fill = day_lbl),
            shape = 21, colour = "white", stroke = 0.3, alpha = 0.65) +
    scale_size_continuous(
      name   = if (lang == "nl") "Vangst (kg)" else "Catch (kg)",
      range  = c(1.5, 12), labels = scales::comma
    ) +
    scale_fill_manual(
      name   = if (lang == "nl") "Dag" else "Day",
      values = day_colours2
    ) +
    guides(
      fill = guide_legend(nrow = 1, order = 1,
                          override.aes = list(shape = 22, size = 5,
                                              stroke = 0.3, colour = "white")),
      size = guide_legend(nrow = 1, order = 2,
                          override.aes = list(fill = "grey60", colour = "white"))
    ) +
    labs(title    = glue("{paste(setvessel, collapse='/')} — ",
                         "{if(lang=='nl') 'vangst per trek per soort' else 'catch per haul by species'}"),
         subtitle = glue("{txt('plot_trip_lbl')} {paste(settrip, collapse=', ')} | ",
                         "{format(report_start,'%d %b')} – {format(report_end,'%d %b %Y')}"),
         caption  = fig_nums("catchperspecies"),
         x = NULL, y = NULL) +
    theme(plot.caption = element_text(size = 9, face = "italic", hjust = 0)) +
    facet_wrap(~facet_lbl, ncol = ncol2)

  print(p2)
}
```

\newpage

<!-- ########################################################################################## -->
<!-- Figure 3: Catch per haul by species and trip                                             -->
<!-- ########################################################################################## -->

```{r fig_vangst_per_haul_setup}
# Determine grouping: by haul (preferred) or by day (elog-only fallback)
# elog_trek and kisten have haul_id; elog-only trips don't.
bar_by_haul <- has_elog_trek || has_kisten
haul_src <- if (has_elog_trek) et else if (has_kisten) m else if (has_elog) e else tibble()

# Per-trip bar counts for proportional panel heights
bar_counts <- if (nrow(haul_src) > 0) {
  if (bar_by_haul) {
    haul_src %>% dplyr::group_by(trip_id) %>%
      dplyr::summarise(n = dplyr::n_distinct(haul_id), .groups = "drop")
  } else {
    haul_src %>% dplyr::group_by(trip_id) %>%
      dplyr::summarise(n = dplyr::n_distinct(date), .groups = "drop")
  }
} else {
  tibble::tibble(trip_id = character(), n = integer())
}
n_bars_total <- sum(bar_counts$n)
n_trips      <- nrow(bar_counts)
fig_h_bar    <- max(4, min(n_bars_total * 0.30 + n_trips * 0.6 + 2, max_fig_h))
```

```{r fig_vangst_per_haul, fig.width=10, fig.height=fig_h_bar}

fig_nums("vangstperhaul", display = FALSE, caption = txt("cap_haul_bar"))

haul_catch <- if (has_elog_trek) et else if (has_kisten) m else if (has_elog) e else tibble()

# x-axis grouping variable: haul_id when available, date when elog-only
x_var     <- if (bar_by_haul) "haul_id" else "date"
x_label   <- if (bar_by_haul) txt("xlab_haul") else if (lang == "nl") "Datum" else "Date"

if (nrow(haul_catch) > 0 && nspecies > 0) {

  # Ensure x_var exists
  if (!x_var %in% names(haul_catch)) {
    if (x_var == "haul_id") haul_catch <- dplyr::mutate(haul_catch, haul_id = dplyr::row_number())
    if (x_var == "date")    haul_catch <- dplyr::mutate(haul_catch, date = as.Date(NA))
  }

  # Top species + "Other"
  top_sp      <- myspecies$species_code
  sp_name_lkp <- myspecies %>%
    dplyr::mutate(sp_label = paste0(.data[[species_name_col]], " (", species_code, ")")) %>%
    dplyr::select(species_code, sp_label)

  bar_data <- haul_catch %>%
    dplyr::group_by(trip_id, .data[[x_var]], species_code) %>%
    dplyr::summarise(weight_kg = sum(weight_kg, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      sp_grp = dplyr::if_else(species_code %in% top_sp, species_code, "Other")
    ) %>%
    dplyr::group_by(trip_id, .data[[x_var]], sp_grp) %>%
    dplyr::summarise(weight_kg = sum(weight_kg, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
    dplyr::left_join(
      dplyr::bind_rows(
        sp_name_lkp %>% dplyr::rename(sp_grp = species_code),
        tibble::tibble(sp_grp = "Other",
                       sp_label = if (lang == "nl") "Overig" else "Other")
      ), by = "sp_grp"
    )

  # Species order by total trip weight descending; Other always last
  sp_order <- bar_data %>%
    dplyr::filter(sp_grp != "Other") %>%
    dplyr::group_by(sp_label) %>%
    dplyr::summarise(tot = sum(weight_kg, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
    dplyr::arrange(desc(tot)) %>%
    dplyr::pull(sp_label)
  other_lbl <- if (lang == "nl") "Overig" else "Other"
  sp_order  <- c(sp_order, other_lbl)

  # ggplot stacks geom_col so that factor level 1 appears at the TOP of the stack
  # (rightmost after coord_flip). Reversing the factor levels puts the highest-
  # catch species (originally level 1) at the BOTTOM = LEFT after coord_flip.
  sp_order_plot <- rev(sp_order)   # reversed for correct left-to-right visual order
  bar_data <- bar_data %>%
    dplyr::mutate(sp_label = factor(sp_label, levels = sp_order_plot)) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(trip_id, .data[[x_var]], sp_label)

  # Viridis colours assigned in trip-weight order (highest = first turbo colour)
  bar_colours <- setNames(
    scales::viridis_pal(option = "turbo")(length(sp_order)),
    sp_order
  )

  # Helper: contrasting text colour
  contrast_colour <- function(hex) {
    rgb <- grDevices::col2rgb(hex) / 255
    lum <- 0.2126 * rgb[1,] + 0.7152 * rgb[2,] + 0.0722 * rgb[3,]
    ifelse(lum > 0.45, "grey15", "white")
  }

  bar_data_stacked <- bar_data %>%
    dplyr::mutate(.sort_idx = match(as.character(sp_label), sp_order)) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(trip_id, .data[[x_var]], .sort_idx) %>%
    dplyr::select(-.sort_idx) %>%
    dplyr::group_by(trip_id, .data[[x_var]]) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      y_top    = cumsum(weight_kg),
      y_bottom = y_top - weight_kg,
      y_mid    = (y_top + y_bottom) / 2,
      trip_max = max(weight_kg)
    ) %>%
    dplyr::ungroup() %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      fill_hex    = bar_colours[as.character(sp_label)],
      fill_hex    = dplyr::if_else(is.na(fill_hex), "grey65", fill_hex),
      text_colour = contrast_colour(fill_hex),
      is_dominant = weight_kg == trip_max,
      show_label  = is_dominant & weight_kg >= trip_max * 0.05
    )
  label_data <- dplyr::filter(bar_data_stacked, show_label)

  p_bar <- ggplot(bar_data,
                  aes(x = factor(.data[[x_var]]), y = weight_kg, fill = sp_label)) +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(
      panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.minor   = element_blank(),
      strip.background   = element_rect(fill = "grey92", colour = "grey60"),
      strip.text         = element_text(size = 9, face = "bold"),
      axis.text          = element_text(size = 8),
      legend.position    = "bottom",
      legend.box         = "horizontal",
      legend.text        = element_text(size = 7),
      legend.title       = element_text(size = 7, face = "bold"),
      legend.key.size    = unit(0.8, "lines")
    ) +
    geom_col(width = 0.8) +
    geom_text(
      data = label_data,
      aes(x = factor(.data[[x_var]]), y = y_mid,
          label = sp_grp, colour = I(text_colour)),
      size = 2.2, fontface = "bold", inherit.aes = FALSE
    ) +
    coord_flip() +
    scale_x_discrete(limits = rev) +
    scale_y_continuous(breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 4),
                       expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.03))) +
    scale_fill_manual(
      name   = if (lang == "nl") "Soort" else "Species",
      values = bar_colours,
      breaks = sp_order,
      guide  = guide_legend(nrow = 2)
    ) +
    labs(
      title    = glue("{paste(setvessel, collapse='/')} — ",
                      "{if (bar_by_haul) {if(lang=='nl') 'aanvoer per soort en trek' else 'catch per species and haul'} else {if(lang=='nl') 'aanvoer per soort en dag' else 'catch per species and day'}}"),
      subtitle = glue("{txt('plot_trip_lbl')} {paste(settrip, collapse=', ')} | ",
                      "{format(report_start,'%d %b')} – {format(report_end,'%d %b %Y')}"),
      x       = x_label,
      y       = if (lang == "nl") "Aanvoer (kg)" else "Catch (kg)",
      caption = fig_nums("vangstperhaul")
    ) +
    theme(plot.caption = element_text(size = 9, face = "italic", hjust = 0)) +
    facet_grid(trip_id ~ ., scales = "free_y", space = "free_y")

  print(p_bar)
}
```

\newpage

<!-- ########################################################################################## -->
<!-- Figure 4: Total catch vs landings per haul (discard estimate)                            -->
<!-- ########################################################################################## -->

```{r fig_discards_setup}
# Only render if haul data exists (zero-catch hauls are now shown too)
has_catchweight <- has_haul && "total_catch_kg" %in% names(h) &&
                   sum(!is.na(h$total_catch_kg) & h$total_catch_kg > 0) > 0

fig_h_disc <- if (has_haul) {
  # Use ALL hauls for height (including zero-catch) so bars are not cramped
  disc_haul_counts <- h %>%
    dplyr::group_by(trip_id) %>%
    dplyr::summarise(n = dplyr::n_distinct(haul_id), .groups = "drop")
  n_disc_hauls <- sum(disc_haul_counts$n)
  n_disc_trips <- nrow(disc_haul_counts)
  max(4, min(n_disc_hauls * 0.30 + n_disc_trips * 0.6 + 2, max_fig_h))
} else { 4 }
```

```{r fig_discards, fig.height=fig_h_disc}
fig_nums("discards", display = FALSE, caption = txt("cap_catch_overview"))

if (has_catchweight) {

  # ── Landing by haul (fallback chain unchanged) ──────────────────────────
  landing_by_haul <- 
    if (has_elog_trek && nrow(et) > 0 && "haul_id" %in% names(et) && sum(!is.na(et$haul_id)) > 0) {
      et %>% dplyr::group_by(trip_id, haul_id) %>%
      dplyr::summarise(landing_kg = sum(weight_kg, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")
  } else if (has_kisten && nrow(m) > 0 && "haul_id" %in% names(m) &&
             sum(!is.na(m$haul_id)) > 0) {
    m %>% dplyr::group_by(trip_id, haul_id) %>%
      dplyr::summarise(landing_kg = sum(weight_kg, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")
  } else if (has_kisten && nrow(m) > 0 && "date" %in% names(m)) {
    m_daily <- m %>% dplyr::group_by(trip_id, date) %>%
      dplyr::summarise(landing_kg = sum(weight_kg, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")
    h %>%
      dplyr::filter(!is.na(total_catch_kg), total_catch_kg > 0) %>%
      dplyr::select(trip_id, haul_id, date) %>%
      dplyr::left_join(m_daily, by = c("trip_id", "date")) %>%
      dplyr::group_by(trip_id, date) %>%
      dplyr::mutate(landing_kg = landing_kg / dplyr::n()) %>%
      dplyr::ungroup() %>%
      dplyr::select(trip_id, haul_id, landing_kg)
  } else if (has_elog && nrow(e) > 0 && "haul_id" %in% names(e)) {
    e %>% dplyr::group_by(trip_id, haul_id) %>%
      dplyr::summarise(landing_kg = sum(weight_kg, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")
  } else {
    tibble::tibble(trip_id = character(), haul_id = integer(), landing_kg = numeric())
  }

  # ── Build disc_data starting from ALL hauls (incl. zero-catch) ──────────
  # Left-join catch and landing onto the full haul list so zero-catch hauls
  # appear as zero-length bars rather than being silently dropped.
  all_hauls <- h %>%
    dplyr::distinct(trip_id, haul_id)

  disc_data <- all_hauls %>%
    dplyr::left_join(
      h %>% dplyr::select(trip_id, haul_id, total_catch_kg, date),
      by = c("trip_id", "haul_id")
    ) %>%
    dplyr::left_join(landing_by_haul, by = c("trip_id", "haul_id")) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      total_catch_kg = dplyr::coalesce(total_catch_kg, 0),
      landing_kg     = dplyr::coalesce(landing_kg,     0),
      discard_kg     = pmax(total_catch_kg - landing_kg, 0),
      discard_pct    = dplyr::if_else(
        total_catch_kg > 0,
        round(100 * discard_kg / total_catch_kg),
        0L
      ),
      haul_lbl = as.integer(haul_id)
    )

  # ── Overall discard % per trip for annotation ────────────────────────────
  x_max_all <- max(disc_data$total_catch_kg, na.rm = TRUE)
  trip_pct <- disc_data %>%
    dplyr::group_by(trip_id) %>%
    dplyr::summarise(
      pct   = dplyr::if_else(
        sum(total_catch_kg) > 0,
        round(100 * sum(discard_kg) / sum(total_catch_kg)),
        0L
      ),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      x_pos = x_max_all * 0.98,
      label = glue::glue("{txt('overall_discards')} {pct}%")
    )

  # ── Pivot to long for stacked bars ───────────────────────────────────────
  lbl_aanvoer  <- txt("lbl_aanvoer")
  lbl_discards <- "Discards"

  disc_long <- disc_data %>%
    dplyr::select(trip_id, haul_lbl, haul_id, landing_kg, discard_kg, discard_pct) %>%
    tidyr::pivot_longer(cols = c(landing_kg, discard_kg),
                        names_to = "type", values_to = "kg") %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      type    = dplyr::recode(type,
                  landing_kg = lbl_aanvoer,
                  discard_kg = lbl_discards),
      type    = factor(type, levels = c(lbl_discards, lbl_aanvoer)),
      pct_lbl = dplyr::if_else(type == lbl_discards & kg > 0,
                  paste0(discard_pct, "%"),
                  NA_character_)
    )

  # Haul 1 at top: factor levels are set per-trip in descending order.
  # Because facet_grid uses scales="free_y", each trip's panel gets its own
  # independent discrete axis — levels only need to be consistent within a trip.
  disc_long <- disc_long %>%
    dplyr::group_by(trip_id) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      haul_lbl = factor(haul_lbl,
                        levels = rev(sort(unique(haul_lbl))))
    ) %>%
    dplyr::ungroup()

  # Label at right edge of full stacked bar
  disc_long_label <- disc_long %>%
    dplyr::group_by(trip_id, haul_lbl) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(bar_total = sum(kg, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
    dplyr::ungroup() %>%
    dplyr::filter(type == lbl_discards, !is.na(pct_lbl))

  ggplot(disc_long, aes(y = haul_lbl, x = kg, fill = type)) +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(
      strip.background   = element_rect(fill = "grey90"),
      strip.text.y.right = element_text(angle = -90),  # rotated to the right
      panel.grid.minor   = element_blank(),
      legend.position    = "bottom"
    ) +
    geom_col(width = 0.7, alpha = 0.85) +
    geom_text(
      data = disc_long_label,
      aes(x = bar_total, y = haul_lbl, label = pct_lbl),
      hjust = -0.15, size = 2.8, inherit.aes = FALSE, colour = "grey20"
    ) +
    geom_text(
      data = trip_pct,
      aes(x = x_pos, y = Inf, label = label),
      hjust = 1, vjust = 1.5, size = 3, fontface = "bold", inherit.aes = FALSE
    ) +
    scale_fill_manual(
      name   = NULL,
      values = setNames(c(pal_aanvoer, pal_discards),
                        c(lbl_aanvoer, lbl_discards))
    ) +
    scale_x_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.18))) +
    facet_grid(trip_id ~ ., scales = "free_y", space = "free_y") +
    labs(
      title    = glue("{paste(setvessel, collapse='/')} — {txt('cap_catch_overview')}"),
      subtitle = glue("{txt('plot_trip_lbl')} {paste(settrip, collapse=', ')} | ",
                      "{format(report_start,'%d %b')} \u2013 {format(report_end,'%d %b %Y')}"),
      caption  = fig_nums("discards"),
      y = if (lang == "nl") "Trek" else "Haul",
      x = "kg"
    ) +
    theme(plot.caption = element_text(size = 9, face = "italic", hjust = 0))
}
```

\newpage

<!-- ########################################################################################## -->
<!-- Figure 5: Cumulative catch by species, week and year                                     -->
<!-- ########################################################################################## -->

```{r layout_species}
ncol_species <- if (nspecies <= 4) 2 else if (nspecies <= 9) 3 else 4
fig_h_cumul  <- min((10 / ncol_species) * ceiling(nspecies / ncol_species) + 1.5, max_fig_h)
```

```{r fig_aanvoer_cumulatief, fig.height=fig_h_cumul}

fig_nums("aanvoerperweekenjaar", display = FALSE,
         caption = txt("cap_cumul"))

if (has_elog && nspecies > 0) {
  current_year <- year(max(e$date, na.rm = TRUE))

  # Reload full elog for multi-year context, strictly for this vessel
  elog_hist <- elog %>%
    dplyr::filter(
      vessel %in% setvessel,
      year(date) >= current_year - 3,
      date <= max(e$date, na.rm = TRUE),
      species_code %in% myspecies$species_code
    ) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      species_code = harmonise_species(species_code),
      yr = year(date),
      wk = isoweek(date)
    ) %>%
    dplyr::group_by(vessel, species_code, yr, wk) %>%
    dplyr::summarise(landing_kg = sum(weight_kg, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
    dplyr::group_by(vessel, species_code, yr) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(wk) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      cumweight = cumsum(landing_kg),
      year      = as.character(yr),
      is_current = (yr == current_year)
    ) %>%
    dplyr::ungroup() %>%
    dplyr::left_join(
      dplyr::select(asfis, species, dutchname, englishname) %>%
        dplyr::mutate(species = as.character(species),
                      dutchname   = as.character(dutchname),
                      englishname = as.character(englishname)),
      by = c("species_code" = "species")
    ) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(species_code = factor(species_code, levels = myspecies$species_code)) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      sp_name  = as.character(if (lang == "nl")
                   dplyr::coalesce(as.character(dutchname),   as.character(species_code))
                 else
                   dplyr::coalesce(as.character(englishname), as.character(species_code))),
      sp_label = paste0(sp_name, " (", species_code, ")"),
      sp_label = factor(sp_label,
                   levels = paste0(
                     if (lang == "nl")
                       dplyr::coalesce(
                         as.character(asfis$dutchname[match(levels(species_code), as.character(asfis$species))]),
                         levels(species_code))
                     else
                       dplyr::coalesce(
                         as.character(asfis$englishname[match(levels(species_code), as.character(asfis$species))]),
                         levels(species_code)),
                     " (", levels(species_code), ")"))
    )

  year_levels  <- sort(unique(elog_hist$year))
  n_yr         <- length(year_levels)
  cur_yr_chr   <- as.character(current_year)
  prev_yr_chr  <- as.character(current_year - 1)

  yr_colours <- setNames(
    c(rep(pal_hist_year, max(0, n_yr - 2)), pal_prev_year, pal_cur_year)[seq_len(n_yr)],
    year_levels
  )
  yr_widths  <- setNames(
    c(rep(0.4, max(0, n_yr - 1)), 1.2)[seq_len(n_yr)],
    year_levels
  )
  yr_alpha   <- setNames(
    c(rep(0.7, max(0, n_yr - 1)), 1.0)[seq_len(n_yr)],
    year_levels
  )

  ggplot(elog_hist, aes(x = wk, y = cumweight, colour = year,
                         linewidth = year, alpha = year)) +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(text = element_text(size = 10),
          strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey90"),
          panel.grid.minor = element_blank()) +
    geom_line() +
    scale_colour_manual(txt("legend_year"),    values = yr_colours) +
    scale_linewidth_manual(txt("legend_year"), values = yr_widths,  guide = "none") +
    scale_alpha_manual(txt("legend_year"),     values = yr_alpha,   guide = "none") +
    labs(
      title = glue("{paste(setvessel, collapse='/')} — {txt(\"plot_cumul\")}"),
      x = txt("xlab_week"), y = txt("ylab_cumul")
    ) +
    facet_wrap(~sp_label, scales = "free_y", ncol = ncol_species)
}
```

_`r fig_nums("aanvoerperweekenjaar")`_

\newpage

\newpage

```{r session_info, include=FALSE}
# Quick note for debugging
message(glue("Report complete: vessel={paste(setvessel, collapse=',')}, ",
             "trip(s)={paste(settrip, collapse=',')}, ",
             "elog={nrow(e)} rows, elog_trek={nrow(et)} rows, ",
             "haul={nrow(h)} rows, kisten={nrow(m)} rows"))
```
